description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single "package" stage. Define a hidden .openssh_template that sets the artifacts to the "packages/" directory and runs the shell command "scripts/build_openssh.sh". Add two jobs named "CentOS 6" and "CentOS 7" that both run in the package stage, use the Docker images "centos:centos6" and "centos:centos7" respectively, and inherit the template's script and artifacts.
